name: hyperagentic-age
note: Typed canon for the hyperagentic-age universe (agenticstory schema v0.5). Structured/load-bearing records live here; prose narrative canon may live in CANON.md. Self-contained (SPEC §3a): every referenced asset resolves under assetRoot inside this repo. The identity block (SPEC §11/§12) holds this universe's constants so generic framework skills read data instead of hardcoding the universe. Validated by the agenticstory engine; the canonical spec is defined at https://agenticstory.wiki.
